nasb.text: praising God and having favor with all the people. And the Lord was adding to their number day by day those who were being saved.

esv.text: praising God and having favor with all the people. And the Lord added to their number day by day those who were being saved.

cnv.text: 又讚美　神，並且得到全民的喜愛。主將得救的人，天天加給教會。

ccb.text: 赞美上帝，受到众人的喜爱。主使得救的人数与日俱增。

csbs.text: 赞美神，并且得到全体民众的喜爱。主就在那里使得救的人与日俱增。
